description: Style NoteFor the coolest outdoorsy style choose wildcraft - specially designed for active types who care about the high performance of their gear (but don't worry, you won't miss out on style either - the brand have easily fused form and function in their products).Product DetailsSea green T-shirt, round neck, short sleeves and print on chestMaterials and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryWarm iron on reverseSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size MPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
